description: Dashboard responsive design improvements and CLI help text enhancements
steps: 1. In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css: Add tablet breakpoint @media (max-width: 1024px) to reduce sidebar width to 200px and adjust grid layouts. Add table overflow-x: auto wrapper for data tables on mobile.

2. In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css: Ensure no hover-only interactions exist - add :focus-visible styles alongside :hover for all interactive elements (.btn, .card, .nav-link). Add touch-action: manipulation to buttons.
3. In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css: Add scroll-snap for horizontal card carousels on mobile. Add .table-responsive class with overflow-x: auto and -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch.

4. In src/augur/cli.py: Add epilog examples to each command using click's epilog parameter. For 'analyze' command add examples like 'augur analyze AAPL', 'augur analyze NVDA --pe 60 --roe 0.45'. For 'consensus' add similar examples.
5. In src/augur/cli.py: Verify --version flag works (it already uses @click.version_option). Add short description improvements to command help strings to be more descriptive.
6. In src/augur/cli.py: Add deprecation warnings for any parameters that have been superseded - add a callback that prints 'Warning: --X is deprecated, use --Y instead' pattern if applicable.
acceptance_criteria: CSS includes tablet breakpoint (max-width: 1024px) with adjusted sidebar
All interactive elements have :focus-visible styles for accessibility
Tables have overflow-x: auto wrapper for mobile scrolling
CLI commands have example text in their help output
--version flag works and returns current version
verification: python -c "from click.testing import CliRunner; from augur.cli import main; r = CliRunner().invoke(main, ['--version']); assert '6.1.0' in r.output; print('OK')"
